'''Janu''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Chef/Legends|chef]] who worked for the criminal [[X'Ting]] [[Trillot]] as a cook. In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], he cooked two wind snakes for [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]] until he and Trillot were later murdered by the [[Dark Acolyte/Legends|Dark Acolyte]]. He was large, brown, and had a distended chin and a horned crest.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Cestus Deception]]'' {{1st}}
